bird.name: Sombre pigeon
bird.summary: The sombre pigeon (Cryptophaps poecilorrhoa) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is the only species within the genus Cryptop…

relations.subject: Sombre pigeon
relations.evidence: Baker |name-list-style=amp |year=2007 |title=Mitochondrial and nuclear DNA sequences support a Cretaceous origin of Columbiformes and a dispersal-driven radiation in the Paleogene |journal=Systematic Biology |volume=56 |issue=4 |pages=656–672 |doi=10.1080/10635150701549672 |pmid=17661233|doi-access=free }} It is endemic to the Indonesian island of Sulawesi in Wallacea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
